vulnerability.reference: Security operators in prolonged monitoring tasks rely on AI summaries to reduce cognitive load, missing errors due to fatigue.
vulnerability.generated: Security personnel lack real-time independent verification capacity to detect plausible but incorrect AI-generated causal chains during prolonged monitoring.

impact.reference: Delayed detection of security threats, leading to preventable incidents.
impact.generated: Undetected critical events in surveillance feeds allow security threats to escalate into preventable safety breaches.

dose_response.reference: Step-level reward optimization amplifies incorrect causal explanations in video models, leading security operators to accept plausible but erroneous AI summaries, causing delayed threat detection due to fatigue and reduced scrutiny.
dose_response.generated: Step-level reward optimization amplifies plausible but incorrect causal explanations in video understanding models, which, when used by security personnel lacking real-time verification capacity during monitoring, leads to undetected critical events and escalating safety breaches.
